questions.question: What does an init script eliminate?
questions.questionZh: 初始化脚本（init script）能省去哪些步骤？
options: The per-session setup tax: probing runtime, listing the repo, retrying the same checks each new session
optionsZh: 推理延迟 (Inference Latency)
每次会话（session）的初始化开销：探测运行时（runtime）、列出仓库（repo），以及在每个新会话中重复执行相同的检查。
提供商速率限制 (Provider Rate Limits)
认证令牌 (Authentication Tokens)
questions.explanation: The script pays the tax once and writes the answers into init_report.json the agent reads.
questions.explanationZh: 该脚本仅缴纳一次税款，并将答案写入 init_report.json，供智能体（Agent）读取。

questions.question: What is the init script's failure-mode contract?
questions.questionZh: 初始化脚本（init script）的故障模式契约（failure-mode contract）是什么？
options: Fail loud, fail fast, fail in one place; refuse to start when the workbench is broken
optionsZh: 软失败 (Fail soft) 并继续
失败需显式暴露，快速失败，集中处理；工作台异常时拒绝启动
始终成功
无限重试
questions.explanation: The whole point is to refuse to start when the workbench is broken; silent fallback defeats the purpose.
questions.explanationZh: 核心目的在于：当工作台（workbench）出现故障时，系统应拒绝启动；静默回退（silent fallback）机制将违背这一设计初衷。

questions.question: Which is NOT one of the probes the lesson lists?
questions.questionZh: 以下哪一项不属于本课程列出的探针（probes）？
optionsZh: 运行时版本 (Runtime versions)
依赖项可用性 (Dependency Availability)
测试命令可解析性 (Command Resolvability)
逐词元采样温度 (Token-by-token sampling temperature)
questions.explanation: Probes include runtime versions, deps, test command, paths, env vars, state freshness, last-known-good commit.
questions.explanationZh: 探针 (Probes) 包括运行时版本 (runtime versions)、依赖项 (deps)、测试命令 (test command)、路径 (paths)、环境变量 (env vars)、状态新鲜度 (state freshness) 以及最近已知良好提交 (last-known-good commit)。

questions.question: Why does the lesson say init must be idempotent?
questions.questionZh: 为什么课程中指出 init 必须是幂等（idempotent）的？
options: Running it twice should be a no-op except for a fresh timestamp, so it can be wired into CI, hooks, or a pre-task slash command
It is required by JSON Schema
optionsZh: 符合 SOC 2（Service Organization Control 2）标准。
运行两次除了更新时间戳 (timestamp) 外应为空操作 (no-op)，因此可将其集成到持续集成 (CI)、钩子 (hooks) 或任务前置斜杠命令 (pre-task slash command) 中。
幂等性（Idempotence）节省成本
这是 JSON 模式（JSON Schema）所要求的。
questions.explanation: Idempotence makes init safe to call from many entry points (hooks, CI, slash command).
questions.explanationZh: 幂等性（Idempotence）使得 init 可以从多个入口点（entry points）（如钩子（hooks）、持续集成（CI）、斜杠命令（slash command））安全调用。

questions.question: What is last-known-good commit anchoring?
questions.questionZh: 什么是最后已知良好提交锚定（last-known-good commit anchoring）？
options: The most recent commit by the team lead
Probe the current commit against an LKG file; refuse to start if the diff exceeds a budget without human ratification
The earliest commit in the repo
The merge base of HEAD and main
optionsZh: 团队负责人的最新提交 (commit)
将当前提交 (commit) 与 LKG 文件进行比对；若差异 (diff) 超出预设阈值 (budget) 且未经人工审批 (human ratification)，则拒绝启动。
仓库 (repository) 中的最早提交 (commit)
HEAD 与 main 的合并基点（Merge Base）
questions.explanation: Cloudflare's AI Code Review scopes reviewers against the LKG to prevent drift compounding across sessions.
questions.explanationZh: Cloudflare 的 AI 代码审查 (AI Code Review) 以 LKG (Last Known Good) 为基准划定审查范围，以防止跨会话的漂移 (drift) 累积。

questions.question: What does the lock file with TTL pattern do?
questions.questionZh: 带 TTL（Time To Live）的锁文件（Lock File）模式有什么作用？
options: Writes prereqs.lock after a successful probe pass; subsequent runs trust the lock for 24h and skip expensive probes if the manifest hash matches
optionsZh: 锁定仓库 (repository) 以防止编辑。
成功通过探测 (probe pass) 后写入 prereqs.lock；后续运行将在 24 小时内信任该锁文件，若清单哈希值 (manifest hash) 匹配，则跳过高开销的探测。
在24小时内阻止所有写入操作
禁用持续集成（CI）
questions.explanation: Same shape as Docker layer caches: idempotent probe + content hash = skip.
questions.explanationZh: 与 Docker 层缓存 (Docker layer caches) 模式一致：幂等探测 (idempotent probe) + 内容哈希 (content hash) = 跳过 (skip)。

questions.question: What should NEVER appear in the init hot path?
questions.questionZh: 初始化热路径（init hot path）中绝不应出现什么？
options: Network calls, LLM calls, external license checks; probes are deterministic plumbing under three seconds
optionsZh: 本地文件系统读取 (Local filesystem reads)
网络调用 (Network calls)、LLM 调用 (LLM calls)、外部许可证检查 (external license checks)；探针 (probes) 是耗时低于三秒的确定性底层管道 (deterministic plumbing)。
读取环境变量 (environment variables)
读取锁定文件 (lockfile)
questions.explanation: A probe that calls an LLM is a workflow, not a probe; keep init deterministic.
questions.explanationZh: 调用大语言模型（Large Language Model）的探针（Probe）实际上是一个工作流（Workflow），而非探针；请保持初始化（Initialization）具有确定性（Deterministic）。
